Test Hardware Engineer

Google
Mountain View, CA, USA
Mid

Note: Google's hybrid workplace includes remote and in-office roles.

In-office locations: Mountain View, CA, USA; San Francisco, CA, USA.

Remote location(s): California, USA.

Minimum qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
  • Five years of experience.

Preferred qualifications:

  • Experience testing hardware.

About the job

Build and validate official products.

US: $152,000 - $222,000 (USD) + 15% bonus target + equity + benefits

Responsibilities

  • Build systems.
  • Test systems.
